## Description

Please include a summary of the change, the problem it solves, and the motivation behind it. If this is a UI change, please attach screenshots or screen recordings showcasing the visual state before and after.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

Please tick options that apply:

- [ ] **Bug Fix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] **New Feature** (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] **Breaking Change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] **Documentation Update** (addition or improvement of docs/comments)
- [ ] **Refactoring** (code cleanup, performance adjustments, no feature updates)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the manual or automated tests you ran to verify your changes. Provide details on how to reproduce these tests.

- [ ] Build test (`npm run build` succeeds)
- [ ] Linter validation (`npm run lint` passes without errors)
- [ ] Functional test: (e.g., Simulated a merge conflict webhook and resolved it via the playground)

## Screenshots / Demos

*Attach any relevant screenshots, screen recordings, or interactive GIFs here.*

## Checklist:

- [ ] I have used the correct branch naming convention (`feature/` or `fix/`).
- [ ] My code follows the premium styling guidelines and HSL design tokens of this project.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] I have verified that all routing and client-side page transitions function flawlessly.
